plugins.cameraPermission: Tiny Chapters uses your camera so you can attach a fresh family moment to today's memory.
plugins.photosPermission: Tiny Chapters uses your photo library so you can attach a phone photo as a temporary reference until it reaches your NAS backup.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tiny Chapters uses your camera so you can attach a fresh family moment to a memory during development testing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tiny Chapters uses your photo library so you can attach a phone photo as a temporary reference while the original stays outside Supabase.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Tiny Chapters may save a captured photo to your library before it is referenced from a memory during development testing.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Tiny Chapters may connect to a local Photo API on your home network so you can browse NAS photo references during development testing.
